","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/realms/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/realms/README.md","text":"# realms

> Toggle visibility of tiddler groups (realms) via TiddlyWiki filters

Toggle visibility of tiddler groups from the browser using TiddlyWiki filter expressions. Uses a subtract model -- all tiddlers are visible by default, ticking a realm hides its matching tiddlers.

## Key features

* **Filter-based realms** -- each realm defines a TiddlyWiki filter in `realms.json`
* **Subtract model** -- all visible by default, tick to hide matching tiddlers
* **Per-request filtering** -- server keeps all tiddlers in memory, filtering at the HTTP layer
* **Settings UI** -- toggle realms on/off in ControlPanel with visual feedback
* **No restart needed** -- `realms.json` is re-read per request

## Prerequisites

No external prerequisites.

## Quick start

Define realms in `realms.json` (next to `tiddlywiki.info`):

```json
{ "work": { "filter": "[tag[Work]]", "description": "Work tiddlers", "active": false } }
```

Toggle visibility in ControlPanel > Settings > realms.

## Plugin Library

Install from the [rimir plugin library](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-plugin-library/) via *Control Panel → Plugins → Get more plugins*.

## License

MIT -- see [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md)
","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/action-toggle.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/action-toggle.js","text":"/*\
title: $:/plugins/rimir/realms/action-toggle.js
type: application/javascript
module-type: widget

Action widget that toggles a realm's active state via PUT /api/realms
and updates the temp tiddler with the response.

Usage: <$action-realm-toggle realm="realmName"/>

\*/

"use strict";

var Widget = require("$:/core/modules/widgets/widget.js").widget;

var ActionRealmToggle = function(parseTreeNode, options) {
	this.initialise(parseTreeNode, options);
};

ActionRealmToggle.prototype = new Widget();

ActionRealmToggle.prototype.render = function(parent, nextSibling) {
	this.computeAttributes();
	this.execute();
};

ActionRealmToggle.prototype.execute = function() {
	this.realmName = this.getAttribute("realm");
};

ActionRealmToggle.prototype.refresh = function(changedTiddlers) {
	return this.refreshSelf();
};

ActionRealmToggle.prototype.invokeAction = function(triggeringWidget, event) {
	var self = this;
	var realmName = this.realmName;
	if(!realmName) return true;

	// Read current state
	var tempTiddler = this.wiki.getTiddler("$:/temp/rimir/realms");
	var realms = {};
	if(tempTiddler) {
		try { realms = JSON.parse(tempTiddler.fields.text); } catch(e) {}
	}
	var currentActive = realms[realmName] ? realms[realmName].active : true;
	var newActive = !currentActive;

	// Send PUT request
	var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
	xhr.open("PUT", "/api/realms", true);
	xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
	xhr.setRequestHeader("X-Requested-With", "TiddlyWiki");
	xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
		if(xhr.readyState === 4 && xhr.status === 200) {
			self.wiki.addTiddler(new $tw.Tiddler({
				title: "$:/temp/rimir/realms",
				type: "application/json",
				text: xhr.responseText
			}));
			self.wiki.addTiddler(new $tw.Tiddler({
				title: "$:/temp/rimir/realms-changed",
				text: "yes"
			}));
		}
	};
	var body = {};
	body[realmName] = {active: newActive};
	xhr.send(JSON.stringify(body));
	return true;
};

exports["action-realm-toggle"] = ActionRealmToggle;
","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"widget","created":"20260305110707526","modified":"20260305110707526"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/changelog","created":"20260305110707526","modified":"20260305110707526","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Changelog

|!Version |!Date |!Changes |

"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/architecture","created":"20260305110707526","modified":"20260305110707526","rdt.order":"2","rdt.plugin-key":"realms","rdt.plugin-name":"realms","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Toggle visibility of tiddler groups using filter expressions","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Core principle

All tiddlers loaded into `$tw.wiki`, realm filtering only at HTTP layer.

!! Data flow

`realms.json` (disk) → `getExcludedTitles()` → runs each active (ticked) realm's TW filter → Set of excluded titles → skinny/fat tiddler routes skip excluded titles.

!! Route replacement

Uses `th-server-command-post-start` hook (after `--listen` fires) to replace:

* `GET /recipes/default/tiddlers.json` (skinny list)
* `GET /recipes/default/tiddlers/:title` (fat tiddler)

!! Filter execution

Per request: reads `realms.json`, runs filters for active (ticked) realms against full wiki, collects matched title set for exclusion.

!! Components

|!Component |!Layer |!Role |
|`startup.js` |Server |Hook + route replacement + `getExcludedTitles()` |
|`route-api-get.js` |Server |`GET /api/realms` — read config |
|`route-api-put.js` |Server |`PUT /api/realms` — update active state |
|`action-toggle.js` |Browser |`<$action-realm-toggle>` widget (XHR + CSRF) |
|`ui-startup.js` |Browser |Fetches realm state into `$:/temp/rimir/realms` |
|`ui.tid` |Browser |Control Panel settings UI |

!! Config storage

`realms.json` next to `tiddlywiki.info`, read per request (live), written by PUT (active field only), not a wiki tiddler.

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="danger">
<$fill $name="body">`exports.before = ["commands"]` is critical in `startup.js`. Without it, the hook registers after `--listen` fires and routes are never replaced.</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/dev-workflow":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/dev-workflow","created":"20260305110707527","modified":"20260305110707527","rdt.order":"3","rdt.plugin-key":"realms","rdt.plugin-name":"realms","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Toggle visibility of tiddler groups using filter expressions","rdt.section":"Dev Workflow","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Plugin files

|!File |!Role |
|`startup.js` |Server-side: hook + route replacement + `getExcludedTitles()` |
|`route-api-get.js` |Server-side: `GET /api/realms` |
|`route-api-put.js` |Server-side: `PUT /api/realms` (merges `active` only) |
|`action-toggle.js` |Browser-side: `<$action-realm-toggle>` widget (XHR + CSRF) |
|`ui-startup.js` |Browser-side: fetches realm state into `$:/temp/rimir/realms` |
|`ui.tid` |Control Panel > Settings > Realms UI |
|`styles.tid` |CSS for settings UI |

!! Restart rules

|!Change |!Restart needed? |
|`realms.json` active state |No — re-read per request |
|`startup.js` / route files |Yes — JS modules |
|Action/UI tiddlers |Yes — plugin shadow tiddlers |

!! Debugging

Check startup logs for "realms: ..." messages. Test with curl:

* Check state: `curl http://localhost:8080/api/realms`
* Tick (hide) a realm: `curl -X PUT -H "X-Requested-With: TiddlyWiki" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"realm-name": {"active": true}}' http://localhost:8080/api/realms`
* Untick (show) a realm: `curl -X PUT -H "X-Requested-With: TiddlyWiki" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"realm-name": {"active": false}}' http://localhost:8080/api/realms`
* Verify skinny list: `curl http://localhost:8080/recipes/default/tiddlers.json`
* Verify fat tiddler 404 for ticked realm's tiddler

!! Key gotchas

* CSRF: PUT routes need `X-Requested-With: TiddlyWiki` header
* Route matching: use `route.path.test(url)` not `.source` string comparison
* TW `$checkbox` can't reflect JSON-backed state; use `$button` + `$reveal` + `jsonget`

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip">
<$fill $name="body">On Windows, use `taskkill //F //PID <pid> //T` to kill the server.</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/examples","created":"20260305110707528","modified":"20260305110707528","rdt.order":"4","rdt.plugin-key":"realms","rdt.plugin-name":"realms","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Toggle visibility of tiddler groups using filter expressions","rdt.section":"Examples","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Filter recipes

Example `realms.json` filters:

* By title prefix: `[prefix[private/]]`
* By tag: `[tag[draft]]`
* By field value: `[field:status[archived]]`
* By regex: `[regexp:title[^(tmp|temp)-]]`
* Combined: `[prefix[work/]tag[draft]]`

Multiple independent realms in `realms.json`:

```json
{
  "drafts": {
    "filter": "[tag[draft]]",
    "description": "Draft tiddlers",
    "active": true
  },
  "archived": {
    "filter": "[field:status[archived]]",
    "description": "Archived tiddlers",
    "active": false
  },
  "private": {
    "filter": "[prefix[private/]]",
    "description": "Private tiddlers",
    "active": true
  }
}
```

!! API usage

Read all realms:

```
curl http://localhost:8080/api/realms
```

Toggle a realm off:

```
curl -X PUT \
  -H "X-Requested-With: TiddlyWiki" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"drafts": {"active": false}}' \
  http://localhost:8080/api/realms
```

Toggle a realm on:

```
curl -X PUT \
  -H "X-Requested-With: TiddlyWiki" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"archived": {"active": true}}' \
  http://localhost:8080/api/realms
```

!! Behavior notes

* All tiddlers visible by default — ticking a realm subtracts its tiddlers
* Overlap: a tiddler is hidden if ANY active (ticked) realm's filter matches it
* System tiddlers: require full reload to appear/disappear in browser
* New tiddlers: subject to realm filters immediately
* No restart needed for config changes

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="warning">
<$fill $name="body">If a tiddler matches multiple active (ticked) realms, it will be hidden. Realms are additive in their exclusion.</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/faq":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/faq","created":"20260305110707528","modified":"20260305110707528","rdt.order":"5","rdt.plugin-key":"realms","rdt.plugin-name":"realms","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Toggle visibility of tiddler groups using filter expressions","rdt.section":"FAQ","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Q: Why filter at the HTTP layer instead of the wiki store?

If tiddlers were removed from `$tw.wiki`, server-side operations (filters, indexes, cross-references) would break. HTTP-layer filtering keeps all tiddlers available on the server while controlling what the browser sees.

!! Q: What happens with overlapping realms?

If a tiddler matches multiple active (ticked) realms, it is hidden. Realm exclusions are additive. There is no priority system — any single ticked realm that matches a tiddler will hide it.

!! Q: Why not use $checkbox for the toggle UI?

TW's `$checkbox` widget can't reflect state stored in a JSON field of a `$:/temp/` tiddler. The realms UI uses `$button` + `$reveal` + `jsonget` to read active state from the JSON-backed `$:/temp/rimir/realms` tiddler.

!! Q: Do realm changes survive a server restart?

Yes. `PUT /api/realms` writes the updated `active` state to `realms.json` on disk. The file persists across restarts.

!! Q: How do I debug missing tiddlers?

# Check `curl http://localhost:8080/api/realms` to see which realms are ticked (active = hidden)
# Check if the missing tiddler matches a ticked realm's filter
# Check `curl http://localhost:8080/recipes/default/tiddlers.json` to see if the tiddler appears in the skinny list
# For system tiddlers, remember they require a full browser reload regardless of realms

!! Q: Can I add a new realm without restarting?

Yes. Edit `realms.json` directly — it is re-read on every request. No restart needed for config changes.

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/overview","created":"20260305110707529","modified":"20260305110707529","rdt.hub-category":"infrastructure","rdt.hub-category-name":"Infrastructure","rdt.hub-order":"1","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"realms","rdt.plugin-name":"realms","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Toggle visibility of tiddler groups using filter expressions","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! What it does

Subtract tiddler groups from the browser by ticking them. All tiddlers are visible by default; each ticked realm's filter removes matching tiddlers from the HTTP response. Server keeps all tiddlers in memory; filtering happens at the HTTP layer only.

!! Features

* Subtract model: all tiddlers visible by default, tick a realm to hide its tiddlers
* Filter-based: each realm uses a TW filter expression to match tiddlers
* HTTP-layer filtering: server keeps everything, browser only sees non-subtracted tiddlers
* Live config: `realms.json` re-read per request — no restart for config changes
* Browser UI: toggle realms in Control Panel > Settings > Realms (ticked = hidden, strikethrough)
* API: GET/PUT endpoints for reading and updating realm state

!! Prerequisites

TW Node.js server mode, `realms.json` in wiki root.

!! Quick start

# Create `realms.json` with example realm definitions (by prefix, tag, etc.)
# Start server
# Toggle in Control Panel > Settings > Realms

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info">
<$fill $name="body">Normal tiddlers appear/disappear via syncer polling (~4-10s). System/shadow tiddlers require a full page reload.</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/reference":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/reference","created":"20260305110707529","modified":"20260305110707529","rdt.order":"6","rdt.plugin-key":"realms","rdt.plugin-name":"realms","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Toggle visibility of tiddler groups using filter expressions","rdt.section":"Reference","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! GET /api/realms

Returns the full `realms.json` content as JSON. No parameters.

```json
{
  "drafts": {"filter": "[tag[draft]]", "description": "Draft tiddlers", "active": true}
}
```

!! PUT /api/realms

Updates `active` state of existing realms. Requires CSRF header.

|!Header |!Value |!Required |
|`Content-Type` |`application/json` |Yes |
|`X-Requested-With` |`TiddlyWiki` |Yes (CSRF) |

Request body — only `active` is merged, unknown realm names are ignored:

```json
{"realm-name": {"active": false}}
```

|!HTTP |!Condition |
|200 |Success — returns updated full realms object |
|400 |Invalid JSON |
|500 |File read/write failure |

!! <$action-realm-toggle> widget

|!Attribute |!Required |!Description |
|`realm` |Yes |Realm name to toggle |

Reads current state from `$:/temp/rimir/realms`, sends PUT, updates temp tiddler on success.

!! realms.json schema

```json
{
  "realm-name": {
    "filter": "TW filter expression",
    "description": "Human-readable label",
    "active": true
  }
}
```

|!Field |!Type |!Description |
|`filter` |string |TW filter run against `$tw.wiki` for active (ticked) realms |
|`description` |string |Display label in settings UI |
|`active` |boolean |`true` = tiddlers hidden (subtracted), `false` = tiddlers visible |

!! State tiddlers

|!Tiddler |!Type |!Set by |!Description |
|`$:/temp/rimir/realms` |`application/json` |ui-startup.js, action-toggle.js |Full realms state |
|`$:/temp/rimir/realms-changed` |text |action-toggle.js |Change signal (`"yes"`) |

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/tw-internals":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/doc/tw-internals","created":"20260305110707529","modified":"20260305110707529","rdt.order":"7","rdt.plugin-key":"realms","rdt.plugin-name":"realms","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Toggle visibility of tiddler groups using filter expressions","rdt.section":"TW Internals","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! th-server-command-post-start hook

TW fires this hook after the `--listen` command starts the HTTP server. The realms plugin registers a callback that iterates `server.routes` and replaces the skinny-list and fat-tiddler routes with realm-aware versions. This is the only reliable point to intercept routes after the server is running.

!! exports.before = ["commands"]

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="danger">
<$fill $name="body">Without `exports.before = ["commands"]`, the startup module runs after `--listen` has already fired. The hook registers too late and routes are never replaced. This is the most common cause of "realms not working".</$fill>
</$transclude>

!! Route replacement at runtime

TW stores routes in `server.routes` as an array. The plugin finds the skinny-list and fat-tiddler routes by testing each route's `path` regex against known URLs (`/recipes/default/tiddlers.json` and `/recipes/default/tiddlers/SomeTitle`). It then replaces those array entries with new handler functions.

!! Skinny vs fat tiddler routes

* ''Skinny list'' (`GET /recipes/default/tiddlers.json`): returns all tiddler titles + fields (no body). The browser syncer polls this to detect changes.
* ''Fat tiddler'' (`GET /recipes/default/tiddlers/:title`): returns a single tiddler with full body. The browser fetches this when it detects a change in the skinny list.

Both routes are replaced to exclude tiddlers matched by inactive realm filters.

!! CSRF validation

TW's server requires `X-Requested-With: TiddlyWiki` header on mutating requests. This is enforced by the core HTTP server, not by individual routes. The `action-toggle.js` widget includes this header on PUT requests.

!! Filter execution on the server

`$tw.wiki.filterTiddlers(filter)` runs a TW filter expression server-side and returns matching titles. The realms plugin runs each inactive realm's filter per request to build the exclusion set.

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/documentation","created":"20260305110707530","modified":"20260305110707530","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %>

</$tiddler>

<%endif%>

<polygon points="12 2 22 8.5 12 15 2 8.5"/>

</svg>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/readme","created":"20260305110707531","modified":"20260305110707531","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! realms

Toggle visibility of tiddler groups from the browser using TiddlyWiki filter expressions. Uses a subtract model — all tiddlers are visible by default, ticking a realm hides its matching tiddlers.

!! Key features

* ''Filter-based realms'' — each realm defines a TiddlyWiki filter in `realms.json`
* ''Subtract model'' — all visible by default, tick to hide matching tiddlers
* ''Per-request filtering'' — server keeps all tiddlers in memory, filtering at the HTTP layer
* ''Settings UI'' — toggle realms on/off in ControlPanel with visual feedback
* ''No restart needed'' — `realms.json` is re-read per request

!! Prerequisites

No external prerequisites.

!! Quick start

Define realms in `realms.json` (next to `tiddlywiki.info`):

```
{ "work": { "filter": "[tag[Work]]", "description": "Work tiddlers", "active": false } }
```

Toggle visibility in ControlPanel > Settings > realms.
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/route-api-get.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/route-api-get.js","text":"/*\
title: $:/plugins/rimir/realms/route-api-get.js
type: application/javascript
module-type: route

GET /api/realms — returns the current realm configuration.

\*/

"use strict";

var fs = require("fs");
var path = require("path");

exports.method = "GET";
exports.path = /^\/api\/realms$/;

exports.handler = function(request, response, state) {
	var realmsPath = path.resolve($tw.boot.wikiPath, "realms.json");
	try {
		var data = fs.readFileSync(realmsPath, "utf8");
		response.writeHead(200, {
			"Content-Type": "application/json",
			"Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
		});
		response.end(data);
	} catch(e) {
		response.writeHead(500, {
			"Content-Type": "application/json",
			"Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
		});
		response.end(JSON.stringify({error: "Failed to read realms.json: " + e.message}));
	}
};
","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"route","created":"20260305110707531","modified":"20260305110707531"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/route-api-put.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/route-api-put.js","text":"/*\
title: $:/plugins/rimir/realms/route-api-put.js
type: application/javascript
module-type: route

PUT /api/realms — merges updates into realms.json.

Body: JSON object like {"private": {"active": false}}
Only the "active" field is merged per realm; unknown realms are ignored.

\*/

"use strict";

var fs = require("fs");
var path = require("path");

exports.method = "PUT";
exports.path = /^\/api\/realms$/;
exports.bodyFormat = "string";

exports.handler = function(request, response, state) {
	var realmsPath = path.resolve($tw.boot.wikiPath, "realms.json");
	var body;
	try {
		body = JSON.parse(state.data);
	} catch(e) {
		response.writeHead(400, {
			"Content-Type": "application/json",
			"Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
		});
		response.end(JSON.stringify({error: "Invalid JSON body"}));
		return;
	}
	try {
		var realms = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(realmsPath, "utf8"));
		// Merge updates — only touch existing realms, only update "active"
		var keys = Object.keys(body);
		for(var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
			var realmName = keys[i];
			if(realms[realmName] && body[realmName] !== null && typeof body[realmName] === "object") {
				var active = body[realmName].active;
				if(typeof active === "boolean") {
					realms[realmName].active = active;
				} else if(active === "true" || active === "false") {
					realms[realmName].active = (active === "true");
				}
			}
		}
		fs.writeFileSync(realmsPath, JSON.stringify(realms, null, 4) + "\n", "utf8");
		response.writeHead(200, {
			"Content-Type": "application/json",
			"Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
		});
		response.end(JSON.stringify(realms));
	} catch(e) {
		response.writeHead(500, {
			"Content-Type": "application/json",
			"Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
		});
		response.end(JSON.stringify({error: "Failed to update realms.json: " + e.message}));
	}
};
","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"route","created":"20260305110707531","modified":"20260305110707531"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/settings","created":"20260305110707531","modified":"20260305110707531","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\define render-realm(realmName)
<$let
  isActive={{{ [[$:/temp/rimir/realms]get[text]jsonget<__realmName__>,[active]] }}}
  realmDesc={{{ [[$:/temp/rimir/realms]get[text]jsonget<__realmName__>,[description]] }}}
  realmFilter={{{ [[$:/temp/rimir/realms]get[text]jsonget<__realmName__>,[filter]] }}}
  statusText={{{ [<isActive>match[true]then[hidden]else[visible]] }}}
  buttonClass={{{ [<isActive>match[true]then[tc-btn-invisible rimir-realm-btn rimir-realm-hidden]else[tc-btn-invisible rimir-realm-btn rimir-realm-visible]] }}}
>
<div class="rimir-realm-row">
<$button class=<<buttonClass>> actions="<$action-realm-toggle realm='$realmName$'/>">
  <$reveal type="match" default=<<isActive>> text="true" tag="span">☑ <del>''$realmName$'' — <$text text=<<realmDesc>>/> — <code><$text text=<<realmFilter>>/></code></del></$reveal>
  <$reveal type="nomatch" default=<<isActive>> text="true" tag="span">☐ ''$realmName$'' — <$text text=<<realmDesc>>/> — <code><$text text=<<realmFilter>>/></code></$reveal>
  //(<$text text=<<statusText>>/>)//
</$button>
</div>
</$let>
\end

All tiddlers are visible by default. Tick a realm to subtract its tiddlers. Changes take effect after a browser reload (non-system/non-`module-type`-tiddlers will be automatically refreshed after few seconds, if filesystem-watcher is also installed and active).

<div class="rimir-realm-row rimir-realm-catchall">☑ ''all'' — everything not in a realm below //(always visible)//</div>

<$list filter="[[$:/temp/rimir/realms]get[text]jsonindexes[]]" variable="realmName">
<$macrocall $name="render-realm" realmName=<<realmName>>/>
</$list>

<$reveal state="$:/temp/rimir/realms-changed" type="match" text="yes" tag="div" class="rr-notice rr-notice-warning">

Realm settings changed. <$button class="tc-btn-big-green" message="tm-browser-refresh">Reload now</$button>

</$reveal>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/startup.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/startup.js","text":"/*\
title: $:/plugins/rimir/realms/startup.js
type: application/javascript
module-type: startup

Server-side startup module that hooks into the TiddlyWiki server to filter
tiddlers by realm. Replaces the skinny-list and fat-tiddler routes to subtract
tiddlers from active (ticked) realms.

\*/

"use strict";

exports.name = "realms-startup";
exports.after = ["load-modules"];
exports.before = ["commands"];
exports.platforms = ["node"];
exports.synchronous = true;

exports.startup = function() {
	var fs = require("fs"),
		path = require("path");

	var logger = new $tw.utils.Logger("realms", {colour: "cyan"});
	var realmsPath = path.resolve($tw.boot.wikiPath, "realms.json");

	// Read realms config from disk (called per-request for live updates)
	function readRealms() {
		try {
			return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(realmsPath, "utf8"));
		} catch(e) {
			logger.log("Error reading realms.json:", e.message);
			return {};
		}
	}

	// Build a set of tiddler titles to exclude (active/ticked realms are subtracted)
	function getExcludedTitles() {
		var realms = readRealms();
		var excluded = Object.create(null);
		$tw.utils.each(Object.keys(realms), function(realmName) {
			var realm = realms[realmName];
			if(realm.active === true && realm.filter) {
				var titles = $tw.wiki.filterTiddlers(realm.filter);
				for(var i = 0; i < titles.length; i++) {
					excluded[titles[i]] = true;
				}
			}
		});
		return excluded;
	}

	// Expose on $tw for use by other modules
	$tw.realms = {
		getExcludedTitles: getExcludedTitles,
		readRealms: readRealms
	};

	// Hook into server post-start to replace routes
	$tw.hooks.addHook("th-server-command-post-start", function(server, nodeServer) {
		logger.log("Hooking into server routes for realm filtering");

		// Find and replace routes by matching path regex source
		var routes = server.routes;
		for(var i = 0; i < routes.length; i++) {
			var route = routes[i];
			if(route.method === "GET" && route.path.test("/recipes/default/tiddlers.json")) {
				routes[i] = {
					method: "GET",
					path: route.path,
					handler: createFilteredSkinnyHandler()
				};
				logger.log("Replaced skinny-list route (get-tiddlers-json)");
			} else if(route.method === "GET" && route.path.test("/recipes/default/tiddlers/SomeTitle")) {
				routes[i] = {
					method: "GET",
					path: route.path,
					handler: createFilteredFatHandler()
				};
				logger.log("Replaced fat-tiddler route (get-tiddler)");
			}
		}

		return server;
	});

	// Replacement for GET /recipes/default/tiddlers.json
	function createFilteredSkinnyHandler() {
		var DEFAULT_FILTER = "[all[tiddlers]!is[system]sort[title]]";
		return function(request, response, state) {
			var filter = state.queryParameters.filter || DEFAULT_FILTER;
			if(state.wiki.getTiddlerText("$:/config/Server/AllowAllExternalFilters") !== "yes") {
				if(state.wiki.getTiddlerText("$:/config/Server/ExternalFilters/" + filter) !== "yes") {
					console.log("Blocked attempt to GET /recipes/default/tiddlers.json with filter: " + filter);
					response.writeHead(403);
					response.end();
					return;
				}
			}
			if(state.wiki.getTiddlerText("$:/config/SyncSystemTiddlersFromServer") === "no") {
				filter += "+[!is[system]]";
			}
			var excludeFields = (state.queryParameters.exclude || "text").split(","),
				titles = state.wiki.filterTiddlers(filter);
			// --- Realm filtering (subtract: active realms are hidden) ---
			var excluded = getExcludedTitles();
			var tiddlers = [];
			$tw.utils.each(titles, function(title) {
				if(excluded[title]) {
					return; // skip tiddlers in active (ticked) realms
				}
				var tiddler = state.wiki.getTiddler(title);
				if(tiddler) {
					var tiddlerFields = tiddler.getFieldStrings({exclude: excludeFields});
					tiddlerFields.revision = state.wiki.getChangeCount(title);
					tiddlerFields.type = tiddlerFields.type || "text/vnd.tiddlywiki";
					tiddlers.push(tiddlerFields);
				}
			});
			var text = JSON.stringify(tiddlers);
			state.sendResponse(200, {"Content-Type": "application/json"}, text, "utf8");
		};
	}

	// Replacement for GET /recipes/default/tiddlers/:title
	function createFilteredFatHandler() {
		var knownFields = [
			"bag", "created", "creator", "modified", "modifier", "permissions", "recipe", "revision", "tags", "text", "title", "type", "uri"
		];
		return function(request, response, state) {
			var title = $tw.utils.decodeURIComponentSafe(state.params[0]);
			// --- Realm filtering (subtract: active realms are hidden) ---
			var excluded = getExcludedTitles();
			if(excluded[title]) {
				response.writeHead(404);
				response.end();
				return;
			}
			var tiddler = state.wiki.getTiddler(title),
				tiddlerFields = {};
			if(tiddler) {
				$tw.utils.each(tiddler.fields, function(field, name) {
					var value = tiddler.getFieldString(name);
					if(knownFields.indexOf(name) !== -1) {
						tiddlerFields[name] = value;
					} else {
						tiddlerFields.fields = tiddlerFields.fields || {};
						tiddlerFields.fields[name] = value;
					}
				});
				tiddlerFields.revision = state.wiki.getChangeCount(title);
				tiddlerFields.bag = "default";
				tiddlerFields.type = tiddlerFields.type || "text/vnd.tiddlywiki";
				state.sendResponse(200, {"Content-Type": "application/json"}, JSON.stringify(tiddlerFields), "utf8");
			} else {
				response.writeHead(404);
				response.end();
			}
		};
	}

	logger.log("Realms plugin initialized, config:", realmsPath);
};
","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"startup","created":"20260305110707531","modified":"20260305110707531"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/styles":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/styles","created":"20260305110707532","modified":"20260305110707532","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".rimir-realm-row {
    padding: 4px 0;
}

.rimir-realm-btn {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    text-align: left;
    padding: 6px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
}

.rimir-realm-btn:hover {
    background: #f0f0f0;
}

.rimir-realm-visible {
    color: #333;
}

.rimir-realm-hidden {
    color: #999;
}

.rimir-realm-catchall {
    padding: 6px 8px;
    color: #999;
    font-style: italic;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

"},"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/ui-startup.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/realms/ui-startup.js","text":"/*\
title: $:/plugins/rimir/realms/ui-startup.js
type: application/javascript
module-type: startup

Browser-side startup: fetches realm state from the server and stores it
in a temp tiddler for the settings UI to read.

\*/

"use strict";

exports.name = "realms-ui-startup";
exports.after = ["render"];
exports.platforms = ["browser"];
exports.synchronous = false;

exports.startup = function(callback) {
	var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
	xhr.open("GET", "/api/realms", true);
	xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
		if(xhr.readyState === 4) {
			if(xhr.status === 200) {
				$tw.wiki.addTiddler(new $tw.Tiddler({
					title: "$:/temp/rimir/realms",
					type: "application/json",
					text: xhr.responseText
				}));
			}
			callback();
		}
	};
	xhr.send();
};
","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"startup","created":"20260305110707532","modified":"20260305110707532"}}}
